dsl_rule.translation_notes: Bullish Harami pattern translated as: (1) Previous candle is black (close below open, represented as body < prev_close to capture downtrend continuation), (2) Current candle is white (close > open), (3) Current close at or above midpoint of prior black candle body (approximated as close >= prev_close). Exit on reversal of white candle structure. Success rate favors bear market upbreakout (10.02%), suggesting pattern performs best in downtrends with upside breakout potential.

backtest_rule.reason: Bullish Harami pattern translated as: (1) Previous candle is black (close below open, represented as body < prev_close to capture downtrend continuation), (2) Current candle is white (close > open), (3) Current close at or above midpoint of prior black candle body (approximated as close >= prev_close). Exit on reversal of white candle structure. Success rate favors bear market upbreakout (10.02%), suggesting pattern performs best in downtrends with upside breakout potential.

source_rule_text: Bullish Harami: A two-candle reversal pattern in a downtrend where a black candle is followed by a white candle that opens and closes at or above the midpoint of the prior black candle's body
